title: Human Approval
subtitle: Review sensitive actions that require owner or administrator approval before Aipify proceeds.
intro: Aipify prepares actions and waits for your decision. Nothing sensitive runs without the approval recorded here. This view is read-only — review status, scope, and audit references calmly.

empty.title: No approval requests yet
empty.body: When Aipify needs permission for a sensitive action, the request will appear here for review.

disabled.title: Human Approval is not enabled
disabled.body: This workspace has not been opted in to the Human Approval center yet. Your administrator can enable it when ready.

forbidden.title: Owner or administrator access required
forbidden.body: Human Approval requests can be reviewed by organization owners and administrators during this pilot phase.

auditTimelinePlaceholder: Full audit timeline will be available after audit event list support is enabled.
loadError: Something unexpected happened while loading approvals. Please try again.
